subcodes.first_line: O Lord! By what utterance can I praise Thee for the bounties Thou hast bestowed upon Thy loved ones through Thy grace, Thy munificence and Thy beneficence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای رب بای نطق احمدک علی ما انعمت علی احبتک بفضلک و جودک و احسانک و وهبت
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for children and youth, @naming of children; of individuals
